headline: Sarah Cannon Research Institute Announces Strategic Oncology Research Collaboration with Pfizer
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., May 20, 2026--Sarah Cannon Research Institute (SCRI), one of the world’s leading oncology research organizations conducting community-based clinical trials, today announced a strategic collaboration with Pfizer Inc. to advance the development of Pfizer’s oncology portfolio through a science‑driven and scaled research program designed to bring promising therapies to patients faster and closer to home.

headline: Value Stocks With Earnings Strength Post 3,500% Run Since 2000
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Turns out, loading up on technology giants isn’t the only route to better returns. Value companies, too, stand a decent chance of trouncing the market — as long as several conditions are met. headline: Immunovant’s potential autoimmune ‘blockbuster’; Wave’s RNA editing update
summary: Immunovant shares climbed on results an analyst deemed “compelling” in tough-to-treat arthritis. Elsewhere, Wave’s pioneering rare disease program advanced and Takeda lost an antitrust suit.

headline: Pfizer Advances Pivotal Pediatric Pneumococcal Vaccine Program Following Strong Positive Phase 2 Results
summary: NEW YORK, May 20, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced data from its Phase 2 study (NCT06524414) evaluating the safety, tolerability and immunogenicity of a four-dose series of its investigational 25-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine candidate PF-07872412 (25vPnC) in infants compared to four doses of PREVNAR 20 at months 2, 4, 6 and 12-15.
